summary: Frontend testing for Multi-Tenant School Management System with Context Switching. All features working correctly: dynamic school loading from API, context switching to school principal view, impersonation banner display, data isolation between schools, and exit from preview mode.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing schools from database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-tenant context switching fully functional. 6 schools in database. Platform admin can enter any school context and view school-specific data.

dynamic_school_loading.evidence: 6 schools loaded from /api/schools endpoint and displayed in TenantsManagement page

school_cards_display.evidence: Each school card shows: name, code, status, type, 100 students, 25 teachers, 85% health score, city

open_dashboard_button.evidence: Clicking 'فتح لوحة التحكم' navigates to /principal and enters school context

impersonation_banner.evidence: Orange banner shows 'وضع المعاينة' with school name badge and 'العودة للمنصة' button

school_specific_data.evidence: Dashboard shows school-specific metrics: 100 students, 25 teachers, attendance rates vary by school

back_to_platform_button.evidence: Clicking 'العودة للمنصة' exits impersonation mode and returns to admin dashboard

data_isolation.evidence: Different schools show different attendance data (92% vs 91%), different absent counts (4 vs 7 students)

x_school_context_header.evidence: Backend API correctly filters data based on X-School-Context header
